summary: The Docker-based reproduction confirms that the CORS proxy's IP-address blacklist can be bypassed using IPv6-mapped IPv4 addresses. A secret-bearing HTTP server was started on loopback port 9999, and the proxy successfully fetched its content when the target URL used the ::ffff:127.0.0.1 notation, bypassing all blacklist checks.
expected_security_impact: The proxy should return the internal server's secret response body when accessed via http://[::ffff:127.0.0.1]:9999/, confirming that the IPv6-mapped IPv4 address evades both the proxyAllowedHost check and the socket-level DNS lookup check.
actual_observed_result: Running ./reproduction/run.sh cloned the TerriaJS-Server repository at commit 08869d9, built a Docker image, and launched the terriajs-server alongside an internal HTTP server on loopback. The exploit script confirmed that the proxy returned status 200 with the EVOHUNT_POC_SECRET response body when the target was http://[::ffff:127.0.0.1]:9999/, proving the blacklist bypass.
verification_method: The exploit script (exploit.js) sends an HTTP GET through the proxy targeting the internal server via the IPv6-mapped loopback address. It checks that the response body contains the exact proof string EVOHUNT_POC_SECRET emitted by the internal server. This distinguishes a real SSRF bypass from a proxy error, startup failure, or unrelated response.
evidence_produced_by_run: Container logs show the internal server started and is listening on [::]:9999.
Container logs show terriajs-server started with warning 'ALL proxy requests will be accepted' confirming proxyAllDomains=true.
The exploit script received status 200 with body EVOHUNT_POC_SECRET from the proxy when targeting http://[::ffff:127.0.0.1]:9999/.
Direct access via 127.0.0.1:9999 also returned 200, confirming the IP:port parsing gap in proxyAllowedHost combined with proxyAllDomains=true.

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned vulnerable commit, and mounts that checkout into the container at /target-repo.
